description: Enterprise contains upstream business segment
Upstream segment contains offshore basin
Offshore basin contains offshore production hub
Offshore hub contains subsurface asset domain
Subsurface domain contains reservoir
Reservoir contains producing zone
Reservoir zone contains compartment
Offshore hub contains wells domain
Wells domain contains production well
Production well contains main wellbore
Wellbore contains completion
Wells domain contains water injection well
Offshore hub contains surface production platform
Surface platform contains inlet processing
Inlet processing contains inlet separator
Surface platform contains oil processing
Oil processing contains oil export pump
Surface platform contains gas processing
Gas processing contains gas compressor
Gas processing contains compressor driver
Offshore hub contains utilities
Offshore hub contains safety and control
Enterprise contains downstream business segment
Downstream segment contains industrial region
Industrial region contains refinery complex
Refinery complex contains crude receiving
Crude receiving contains crude storage tank
Crude receiving contains crude charge pump
Refinery complex contains primary processing
Primary processing contains crude distillation unit
Crude distillation unit contains fired heater
Crude distillation unit contains atmospheric column
Refinery complex contains conversion area
Conversion area contains catalytic cracking unit
Refinery complex contains treating area
Refinery complex contains blending and export
Refinery complex contains utilities
Refinery complex contains safety and control
Production well is located in reservoir context
Completion produces from reservoir compartment
Water injection well injects into producing zone
Produced fluids flow from production well to inlet processing
Inlet processing routes wellstream to inlet separator
Inlet separator sends liquid hydrocarbon stream to oil processing
Inlet separator sends gas stream to gas processing
Oil processing sends stabilized crude to export pump
Gas processing sends gas to export compressor
Export gas stream is represented as feeding downstream receiving context
Export crude stream is represented as feeding downstream receiving context
Compressor driver drives gas compressor
Safety and control protects inlet processing
Safety and control protects gas compressor
Offshore utilities feed compressor driver
Crude storage tank supplies crude charge pump
Crude charge pump feeds fired heater
Fired heater feeds atmospheric column
Atmospheric column side streams flow to conversion unit
Atmospheric column streams flow to treating area
Conversion product streams flow to treating area
Treated products flow to blending and export
Refinery utilities provide fuel and services to fired heater
Safety and control protects fired heater
Safety and control protects crude distillation unit

Fired heater has fuel gas flow telemetry
Fired heater has outlet temperature telemetry
Atmospheric column has top temperature telemetry
Atmospheric column has differential pressure telemetry
